canonical_owner: PGAUTH-001 authority table (source-code-truth / migration-history / identities / provenance / relational / vectors / blob-refs rows)
sync_edge_direction: PGAUTH-001 Sync path column (one-way; RuVector derived-only)
identity_boundary: PGAUTH-001 invariant 1 (one canonical owner) + SHA-256 identities
inventory identity column (SHA-256 blob / agent-local / sequence keys)
forbidden_dual_write: PGAUTH-001 invariant 4 (no silent reclassification) + inventory relationship column

sync_edge_direction: PGAUTH-003 Sync path column (one-way promotion only)
identity_boundary: PGAUTH-003 invariant 1 (per-agent, non-authoritative over shared truth)
recovery_source: PGAUTH-003 Failure mode column (defective recordFeedback flagged)
forbidden_dual_write: PGAUTH-003 invariant 2 (explicit one-way promotion, no back-write)

canonical_owner: PGAUTH-004 authority table (source-of-truth column; projections are derived)
identity_boundary: PGAUTH-004 invariant 2 (projection never a competing writable owner)
recovery_source: PGAUTH-004 Failure mode column (re-materialize; SHA-256 byte-exact)

canonical_owner: PGAUTH-005 authority table (external authority owns; LifeOS holds reference)
writers: PGAUTH-005 Writers column (governed handoff / inbound ingestion)
sync_edge_direction: PGAUTH-005 Sync path column (direction + freshness/conflict policy)
identity_boundary: PGAUTH-005 invariant 1 (external is authority) + invariant 2 (no secret-value capture)
recovery_source: PGAUTH-005 Failure mode column (fail-closed; re-solicit; re-retrieve)
